mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_account_lock (user_type, user_id, account, lock_reason, unlock_time, status, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userType}, #{item.userId}, #{item.account}, #{item.lockReason}, #{item.unlockTime}, #{item.status}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
